title: coelandria glomerata
intro: Coelandria glomerata, also known as the Red-coelandria or the Red Coelandria, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Ericaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coelandria glomerata include its potential to treat various conditions such as sore throats, colds, and skin irritations, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties that help prevent infections. Coelandria glomerata is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are made from its leaves and flowers to harness its medicinal properties.
